title: FLOSS Weekly 379: Hoodie
summary:
Hoodie is a free and Open Source Software for building applications for the web and iOS. Hoodie is a "noBackend" technology — it's there for making the lives of frontend developers easier by abstracting away the backend.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
